text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, after <chrname> and I have<n>reached a
milestone...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, Trainer <username>.<n>You've been
working so hard despite<n>how late it's gotten.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... I was wondering, but... do you<n>have any
plans for tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If not, I was hoping we could spend<n>some time
together and have a<n>friendly discussion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she takes me to a hill<n>with a scenic
view of the entire city.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The sky is so beautiful. The sun feels<n>warm too.
It's lovely.
choice_data_list: Um, so why did you bring me here today?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I thought somewhere spacious,<n>without walls,
would be the best place<n>to open up one's heart.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I wonder what I would be<n>like had I
never met you...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If you hadn't changed my stubborn<n>ways.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
When I claimed my goal was to<n>protect my
inexperienced racers'<n>independence, I was
merely trying to<n>make myself look good.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It was no better than neglect, the<n>petty excuse of
an irresponsible adult.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I created an exact path for my<n>trainees by
controlling every aspect of<n>their lives.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I thought that so long as they never<n>strayed from
the path I laid, they had<n>nothing to fear.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That was the one and only way I had<n>to protect
them...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I forced them in a direction I chose<n>based on my
past experiences.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I demanded that they trust me, yet I<n>never tried to
understand them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I was a failure as an educator... and<n>as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I mean it. You... and those precious<n>racers were
the ones who made me<n>realize my wrongs.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You remind me of how I was long<n>
ago—passionate, honest, and trusting<n>of my
racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That similarity was all the more<n>reason why I
couldn't admit that you<n>were skilled.
choice_data_list: Does that mean you acknowledge it now?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Don't look so hopeful.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm joking. It's impossible not<n>to
acknowledge your greatness now.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You brought back a lot of memories I<n>needed
reminding of... and you taught<n>me so much.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: You are the best rival I could ever ask<n>for.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where Trainer Kashimoto is.<n>She
supposedly went this way, but I<n>don't see her...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't hog the path!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the one who finds her<n>first!
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? I'm going findher first!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Stomp, stomp, stomp!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I think I hear Little Cocon and Bitter<n>Glasse. What
are those two doing,<n>yelling in public like that?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I suppose our grown-up chat has to<n>end here.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: My adorable students are waiting for<n>me.
